codeReview.summary: Reviewed the fix commit, worker transcript skeleton, prior synthesis, and prior per-feature reviews. The fix addresses each blocking issue from the prior page-polish scrutiny round: shared SearchBar usage is already consistent across the Goods/Football/Basketball/Concert tabs, concert detail pages now render a concert-specific gradient banner when artwork is absent, basketball cards no longer use arbitrary shadow utilities, the profile menu icon backgrounds now use a static class map, the admin login page now uses tokenized gradient/shadow classes, and the auth pages replace the previously flagged gray text classes with semantic muted tokens.

summary: Pass: the fix feature adequately resolves all prior blocking scrutiny findings for page-polish. No blocking issues remain in the reviewed areas.
